message:
test(labruntime): port 16 protocol_recovery tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port all 16 #[tokio::test] async tests from protocol_recovery.rs to the
asupersync RuntimeFixture pattern. Covers: first-try success, transient
retries, permanent errors, retry exhaustion, circuit breaker, permanent
failure limit, disabled engine, counter resets, stats accessors, and
error kind population.

Note: cargo test blocked by in-progress runtime_compat.rs changes from
another agent; cargo check passes cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
